module_name: 公開資源查找與新鮮度卡
selected_for_v1_4_reason: This module is partner-ready, easy to verify with public sources, and useful before any private case-management work is considered.

public_safety.public_export_rule: Use only public sources, blank templates, fictional examples, and high-level workflow notes.

prototype_intent.plain_language_goal: 協助 Kevin 與夥伴把公開可查的社福、社區、課程、諮詢或轉介資源，整理成可檢核、可更新、可交辦的資料卡。
target_users: 未來協助社工工具線的夥伴

operator_flow.input: 一個公開安全的資源主題或服務情境
operator_flow.done_proof: 主題、適用對象與優先理由已填寫

operator_flow.input: 公開網頁、公開簡章、公開服務說明
operator_flow.done_proof: 每筆來源都有公開來源與檢查日期

operator_flow.input: 夥伴整理的來源摘錄與缺欄
operator_flow.done_proof: 欄位符合模板且缺欄被標記
Kevin 或指定 reviewer 已標記可用、需補件、暫停或 blocked

operator_flow.step_name: 新鮮度與 no-op 檢查
operator_flow.done_proof: 連結與更新狀態已檢查；無變動時有 no-op

resource_card_fields.description: Stable ID for this public resource card.
Plain topic label such as food support, family service, learning resource, or consultation.
Title shown on the public source.
Public organization or page owner, if available.
Publicly stated target group; do not infer private eligibility.
Publicly stated city, district, or service area.
Publicly stated contact or application route; keep private contact notes out.
Date this public source was last checked.
Source freshness state based on public evidence.
Fields that remain unclear from public material.
Reminder that this card is information organization, not eligibility or service decision.

partner_trial_task.title: Public resource card trial
partner_trial_task.task_size: one topic, three public sources, one review question list
stop_conditions: A real person's private details appear
The task starts making eligibility decisions

taiwan_fit_gate.wording_fit: Uses natural Traditional Chinese labels such as 公開來源, 缺欄, 人工覆核, 新鮮度檢查, and 暫停.
taiwan_fit_gate.workplace_habit_fit: Keeps Kevin review visible and gives partners small source-card tasks instead of asking them to make service decisions.
taiwan_fit_gate.mobile_readability_fit: Uses compact cards, short labels, and table-ready fields that can wrap on mobile.

next_version_candidates.candidate: Turn this prototype into a private Notion / Google Sheets workboard selection draft.
Build the citizen finance-life snapshot prototype brief.
Create a report-first freshness-check automation candidate.
